variants: Taiga Morimoto holds a Mana Stream Pilot Card, which certifies him as a professional in the field of mana navigation. Taiga's work has been predominantly funded by the Blazing Juniper Consortium, which supports innovative projects in the mana sector. He primarily conducts his professional interactions in the Cantonese dialect.
